steps.title: Identify the y-intercept and slope
steps.content:
At birth (when $ x = 0 $), the whale's length is 157 cm. This is the y-intercept.
The whale grows at 4.6 cm per month — this is the slope (rate of change).

steps.title: Write the linear equation
steps.content:
Substituting $ m = 4.6 $ and $ b = 157 $ into the linear form: $$y = 4.6x + 157$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
